◎简　　介  

　　The Survivor is a 1981 movie starring Robert Powell and Jenny Agutter, based on a novel of the same name by James Herbert.The film was notable for being the first Australian film to cost more than A$1,000,000 to make. It is also notable for being the final film appearance of actor Joseph Cotten.
